## Protocol, Docs, And Follow-through

- [ ] `plan.md` updated when scope, milestone state, or execution record changed
- [ ] `.codex/change-log.md` updated for meaningful repo changes
- [ ] `.codex/issues-and-resolutions.md` updated when a blocker was found or resolved
- [ ] `.codex/project-memory.md` updated when a durable decision was made
- [ ] `docs/protocols/` and `schemas/` updated if protocol shape or state transitions changed
- [ ] `docs/adr/` updated if an architecture-level choice changed
